Class User

java.lang.Object
com.lockedin.lockedin.model.entity.user.User
public class User extends Object
Represents a user profile with authentication data and fitness calculation helpers.
Version:
1.0
Author:
LockedIn Team

    • User

      public User()

    • User

      public User(int id, String firstName, String lastName, String email, LocalDate dateOfBirth, double height, double weight, String sex, ActivityLevel activityLevel, FitnessGoal fitnessGoal, String password)
      Creates a new User.
      Parameters:
      id - The id.
      firstName - The first name.
      lastName - The last name.
      email - The email.
      dateOfBirth - The date of birth.
      height - The height.
      weight - The weight.
      sex - The sex.
      activityLevel - The activity level.
      fitnessGoal - The fitness goal.
      password - The password.
